content.full_text:
April 12, 2004

The Honorable Lydia M. Villarreal
Post Office Box 615
Salinas, CA 93902

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-049

Dear Judge Villarreal:

Pursuant to your conversation with Commission staff on March 29, 2004, this letter confirms the withdrawal of your request for advice.

Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Marion Cruz
Intern, Legal Division

MC:jg
